versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   harness-delegate-ng-1-0-31      true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: harness
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: harness-delegate-ng-1-0-31
      name: harness-delegate-ng
      namespace: harness
      values: |
        harness-delegate-ng:
          delegateToken: "xyz"
